data.title: Trump's Top Economic Adviser Kevin Hassett Says White House Is Exploring Options To Fire Fed Chair Jerome Powell: 'The President And His Team Will Continue To Study'
data.description: White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett confirmed that the Trump administration is exploring ways to remove Jerome Powell.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Delays Launch Of Affordable Model Y By Several Months: Report
data.description: Tesla delays US launch of affordable Model Y SUV, with production target of 250K units by 2026. Performance models also planned.

data.title: Trump Reverses Elon Musk-Influenced IRS Interim Head Appointment Following Scott Bessent's Objection: Report
data.description: Bessent raised concerns to Trump about interim head appointment by Musk. Faulkender expected to be acting head until Long confirmed.

data.title: Trump's New COVID Website Takes Aim At WHO, Fauci, And Biden Over Pandemic Response, Calls Out China Lab Leak Theory
data.description: President Donald Trump's White House launched a new COVID-19 website on Friday, criticizing the pandemic response by WHO, Dr. Fauci, and President Biden, while endorsing the China lab leak theory as the most likely origin of the virus.

data.title: Elon Musk's DOGE Under Fire: House Democrats Say Agency Is Building Unlawful Master Database Of Sensitive US Data
data.description: House Democrats are investigating Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) for allegedly building a cross-agency database that consolidates sensitive personal data, raising concerns about privacy and national security.
